10.reason: [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with integer 0/9 instead of '0'/'9'; also checking only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but not <= 'z', and similarly for others). This leads to incorrect type checking and potential out-of-bound access when j=0.]

This leads to incorrect type checking and potential out-of-bound access when j=0.]

13.reason: [Loop runs even when a[j+1] <= a[j-1], which violates the requirement that expansion only occurs if the right character is greater than the left. Also, no check for same-type validity due to flawed condition above.]
